title: quiina congesta
intro: Quiina congesta is a species of flowering plant in the family Quiinaceae, native to Central and South America. It is a tree or shrub that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Quiina congesta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Quiina congesta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
